docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT AVEAU, PAULETTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AVEAU, PAULETTE
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-12-1999, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-16-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AVEAU, PAULETTE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $68.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,568.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $80.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT AVEAU, PAULETTE
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT AVEAU, PAULETTE
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT AVEAU, PAULETTE
STATEMENT ON WRIT READS: RELEASED BY BANKRUPTCY
